summary: Iter18 — Prerender + Custom Subdomain feature testing. 45/45 backend+prerender pytest tests PASS, all UI assertions on CustomSubdomainCard PASS, hydration of /pricing prerendered page verified clean (no console errors, root has children, real human content). Regression smoke for /api/admin/credit-packs also PASS.

issues: canonical and og:url point to 'https://deployunit.com/' (root) instead of the actual path (/login, /register, /forgot-password). Likely intentional for SEO (auth pages shouldn't compete with the homepage), but worth confirming the team's intent. Public pages (pricing/about/status/contact/support) correctly point to their own path.

critical_code_review_comments: services/custom_subdomain.py (611 lines) is approaching the 700-line threshold. Future iterations could split the state machine (validate/check/request/cancel/detach/verify_tick) into separate modules under services/custom_subdomain/.

validate_name() accepts uppercase input because normalize_name() lowercases first. This is forgiving UX and intentional, but the public docstring of validate_name should mention 'input is normalized first' to avoid confusion for future callers.
Prerender canonical for /login, /register, /forgot-password resolves to 'https://deployunit.com/' (homepage) — confirm this is intentional. If it is, no change needed.
test_credentials: demo@deployunit.com / demo1234 (workspace owner), admin@deployunit.com / admin123 (admin). Loaded from /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: Created an outsider test user (TEST_iter18_outsider@example.com / Passw0rd!23) via /api/auth/register to verify 403 non-member path. No demo data mutated.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter18 features fully verified. Backend regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter18_custom_subdomain.py covers prerender file existence, root-div content, canonical/og:url correctness, validate_name() unit tests, GET/POST/DELETE /api/apps/{id}/custom-subdomain endpoints (state/check/reserved/404/403/noop), scheduler registration of verify_pending_subdomains_tick at 30s, and credit-packs regression. Preview env has NO Cloudflare configured — that's expected; valid names return available:false with 'Cloudflare is not configured…'. The full provisioning state machine (pending→active or pending→failed) can only be exercised with mocks or in prod. UI testids verified on AppDetail Domains tab: custom-subdomain-form, custom-subdomain-name-input, custom-subdomain-submit, custom-subdomain-check-msg, custom-subdomain-unavailable.

prerender.files_exist: 9/9 routes (index, pricing, about, login, register, forgot-password, status, contact, support)
prerender.root_div_has_real_content: 9/9 routes (text length 80+ chars, contains real page copy)
prerender.canonical_and_og_url_https_deployunit: 9/9 routes — all use https://deployunit.com, NO http://127.0.0.1 or http://localhost leaks
prerender.hydration_check_pricing: Pricing page hydrates cleanly. Title 'Pricing — DeployUnit', visible pricing tiers, 0 page-error/console-error after networkidle.

custom_subdomain_backend.validate_name_unit: PASS — too short, reserved (admin/www/api/mail/status), invalid chars, 60+ reserved entries, valid names
custom_subdomain_backend.GET_check: PASS — too short / reserved (admin,api,www) / invalid chars / valid+cf-not-configured
custom_subdomain_backend.scheduler_30s: PASS — verify_pending_subdomains_tick registered in scheduler.add_job at 30s in server.py:124

custom_subdomain_ui.typing_admin: Shows '✕ admin is reserved by the platform.' and Provision button disabled
custom_subdomain_ui.typing_ab: Shows '✕ Subdomain must be at least 3 characters.'
custom_subdomain_ui.typing_valid_myappt18: Shows '✕ Cloudflare is not configured on the platform yet.' with custom-subdomain-unavailable element present and Provision button disabled
custom_subdomain_ui.testids_present: custom-subdomain-form, custom-subdomain-name-input, custom-subdomain-submit, custom-subdomain-check-msg, custom-subdomain-unavailable — all found
